### Step 2: Formal Proof in Lean

Now, let‚Äôs formalize this reasoning in Lean. 

#### 2.1 Assumptions
We assume `p = 0` and aim to derive a contradiction. 

#### 2.2 Cases on `q`
1. If `q = 0`, then `(q : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) = 0`, so `(1 : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě)/(q : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) = ‚ąě`.

   - But `hr‚āÄ : some r ‚Č† 0`, which is `r ‚Č† 0` because the coercion `NNReal ‚Üí ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě` is injective.
   - Contradiction.

2. If `q ‚Č† 0`, then `(q : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) ‚Č† 0`, so `(1 : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě)/(q : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě)` is finite (as a real number).

   - Again, contradicts `hr‚āÄ`.

#### 2.3 Formalizing in Lean

In Lean, to get a contradiction when `p = 0`, we can proceed as follows:

1. Assume `p = 0`.
2. Get `(1 : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě)/(p : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) = ‚ąě`.

     - Contradiction with `hr‚āÄ`.

      have h‚āā : ENNReal.HolderTriple (some p : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) (some q : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) (some r : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) := hpqr
      have h‚āÉ : (some r : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) ‚Č† 0 := by simpa using hr‚āÄ
      -- Use the property of H√∂lder triples to deduce that p ‚Č† 0.
      have h‚āĄ : (some p : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) ‚Č† 0 := by
        by_contra h
        have h‚āÖ : (some p : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) = 0 := by simpa using h
        have h‚āÜ : ENNReal.HolderTriple (0 : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) (some q : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) (some r : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) := by simpa [h‚āÖ] using h‚āā
        have h‚āá : (some r : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) ‚Č† 0 := by simpa using hr‚āÄ
        -- Use the property of H√∂lder triples to derive a contradiction.
        have h‚āą : (1 : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) = (0 : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) + (1 : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) / (some q : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) := by
          simpa [h‚āÖ, ENNReal.HolderTriple] using h‚āÜ
        have h‚āČ : (1 : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) / (some q : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) = 1 := by
          have h‚āĀ‚āÄ : (1 : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) = (0 : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) + (1 : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) / (some q : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) := h‚āą
          have h‚āĀ‚āĀ : (1 : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) / (some q : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) = 1 := by
            simp [add_zero] at h‚āĀ‚āÄ ‚äĘ
            <;> simpa [h‚āĀ‚āÄ] using h‚āĀ‚āÄ
          exact h‚āĀ‚āĀ
        have h‚āĀ‚āÄ : (some q : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) = 1 := by
          by_cases hq : q = 0
          ¬∑ simp_all [hq]
            <;> norm_num at *
          ¬∑ field_simp [h‚āÉ, hq] at h‚āČ ‚äĘ <;> simp_all [ENNReal.coe_eq_zero]
            <;> norm_num at *
            <;> aesop
        have h‚āĀ‚āĀ : (some r : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) = 1 := by
          have h‚āĀ‚āā : ENNReal.HolderTriple (0 : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) (some q : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) (some r : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) := by simpa [h‚āÖ] using h‚āā
          have h‚āĀ‚āÉ : (some r : ‚ĄĚ‚Č•0‚ąě) ‚Č† 0 := by simpa using hr‚āÄ
          simp [h‚āÖ, h‚āĀ‚āÄ, ENNReal.HolderTriple] at h‚āĀ‚āā
          <;>
          (try norm_num at h‚āĀ‚āā ‚äĘ) <;>
          (try simp_all [ENNReal.coe_eq_zero]) <;>
          (try aesop) <;>
          (try {
            field_simp [h‚āĀ‚āÉ] at h‚āĀ‚āā ‚äĘ
            <;> norm_num at h‚āĀ‚āā ‚äĘ <;>
            (try simp_all [ENNReal.coe_eq_zero]) <;>
            (try aesop)
          })
          <;>
          (try {
            simp_all [ENNReal.coe_eq_zero]
            <;> norm_num at *
            <;> aesop
          })
        simp_all [h‚āĀ‚āÄ, h‚āĀ‚āĀ]
        <;> norm_num at *
        <;> aesop
      exact h‚āĄ
    simpa [ENNReal.some_ne_zero] using h‚āĀ
